items.name_cn:
💰Dior Oblique #
Every big brand has a square bag in the spotlight, and this year DioraddictBag is the one.
The metal is in a vintage patina style, and the designer infuses her feminism into every piece.
Rigid canvas, whether the clean and sharp blue-black or the artistic burgundy,
It reflects the image of every independent woman today.
As for the strap, this comes with an antique gold chain by default
I recommend pairing it with a vintage shoulder strap, worn crossbody at chest or waist level
It instantly elongates your proportions.
Works with winter coats and hoodies, summer t-shirts and skirts, it's a universal match!
Size: 24cm (Only Medium size available)

items.name_cn:
💰♥️❤️❤️30 Montaigne MiniBox Real Shot
I couldn't take my eyes off it when I first saw it on a runway model!
SA said it's a Fall/Winter style! After waiting for a few months, it finally arrived
I couldn't wait to order one
Once I put it on, I couldn't take it off! Comes with a standard full leather strap
You can also change it to other vintage straps as you like
For Oblique, you can get a set referencing the Saddle bag colors ☑️
30 Montaigne is a bag with a strong French style
Minimalist, high-end, with a casual lazy vibe
Looks good crossbody or as a shoulder bag!!
Currently very limited in domestic boutiques
Hard to find, you may need to book and wait
Although it's a small size, the capacity is quite impressive! Plus a small wallet, power bank~
Everything fits easily!
The space is very good, the most important thing is how beautiful it looks!
Size: 19.5*11.5*5cm
(Original packaging included)

items.name_en: 💰♥ Another must-have from the Montaigne series
items.name_cn:
💰♥ Another must-have from the Montaigne series
♥ The 30 Montaigne from 2019 attracted me with its rich French style as soon as it was released. The official website launched its extension this year.
♥ The bag body is relatively shorter and wider, the chain design offers several carrying methods, and the shoulder strap is detachable for other favorite retro straps.
♥ Wear it over the shoulder for a sophisticated OL look, or crossbody for a casual and playful vibe. Of course, the capacity is not an issue, meeting the essential needs of daily outings.
Size: 25*16*8 cm
#

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
『Dior』
🆕 Small 【Di.or Book Tote】M1286 Blue D 💙 Small
Size: 26.5 x 21 x 14 cm
The latest small size of the Tote, I was drawn to this bag 🌿, it is slightly shorter than the original small size, looking very delicate 😘, retaining the exquisite cuteness of a small bag while also having the large capacity of a big bag, fully meeting daily travel needs 🙋🏻‍♀️, classic jacquard embroidery, iconic letters, stylish and versatile with a full retro atmosphere 🤗

items.name_en: DIOR 🫥 BOBBY EAST-WEST Chain Bag 'Oblique + Small Bag'
items.name_cn:
DIOR 🫥 BOBBY EAST-WEST Chain Bag 'Oblique + Small Bag'
This Dior ❤ Bobby East-West Chain Bag is a Summer 2023 new arrival, crafted with blue Oblique print fabric, fashionable and elegant. The flap is adorned with a decorative CD buckle to elevate the style, and the practical compartment contains a small detachable zip pocket. With a detachable chain, it can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch.
Flap closure
Decorative CD buckle on front
6 card slots
1 slip pocket
1 small detachable zip pocket
Detachable chain shoulder strap
Can be paired with this season's signature shoulder strap and thin shoulder strap
Model: 5703
Size: 21.5×12×4cm

items.name_cn:
〖Grey Check Large Makeup Pouch〗
Dior latest Embroidery 🪡 Grey Check [Makeup Pouch] - instantly captivated, the round body is so adorable. The latest embroidery check design is both retro and fashionable, perfectly presenting a rich retro artistic atmosphere with exquisite craftsmanship. Stylish and chic overall~ The square cylindrical shape is casual and modern, perfect for posing or as a makeup bag, toiletry bag, and the capacity speaks for itself la~ Every girl needs one for travel and storage wah~
Model: 1298
Size: 25x15x14cm

items.name_cn:
Small DIOR KEY Handbag ❤
This newly released Dior Key Handbag is a key piece from the 2023 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, inspired by the Dior archives, showcasing a retro style with exquisite fashion. Crafted from green calfskin, it features a distinctive button-style CD logo clasp inspired by a signature lock, with an internal pocket for daily essentials. Small size with slim leather handles, can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand, matching various outfits for an elegant look.
CD Clasp
Leather Handles
Internal Pocket
Model: 0065
Size: 22 x 12.5 x 12 cm

items.name_cn:
【Blue Round Label ❤ Medium】
Dior book tote shopping bag
This Book Tote bag, inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
